channel.title: ArcGIS Pro on Emily Dye
channel.description: Recent content in ArcGIS Pro on Emily Dye

item.title: Marine Spatial Assessment: Cook Islands
item.description: Mapping bathymetry and habitat types for deep-sea mining environmental baseline assessments.

item.title: National Aquatic Resource Surveys (NARS) Data Science
item.description: Processing 4,000+ taxonomic entries and delineating LiDAR elevation gradients for the U.S. EPA.
